programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: Terror At London Bridge
programme.desc: When the London bridge is fully laid a murder spree begins Don Gregory suspects that the bridges historical link to Jack The Ripper and the Thames River may have something to do with the killings

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: This touching documentary investigates the tragic stories of the 306 British Commonwealth soldiers shot for acts of cowardice and desertion during World War One

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: Vietnam Nurses is a 2005 television documentary directed by Polly Watkins It tells the story of six Australian Army nurses who served in a field hospital in Vietnam between the years 1962 and 1972

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Sun Hill is forced to accept the legacy of DS Beech and Meadows discovers that he is not the only one with a questionable past

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Fredy 112
programme.desc: Fredy 112

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler discovers a way to increase his winnings but the method proves to be deadly

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Fredy 119
programme.desc: Fredy 119

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A crate containing a lion bound for a zoo washes up on the island But while the other castaways are scared for their lives the lion immediately makes a bond with Gilligan

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is upset to learn that Little Luke wants to grow up to be a scientist rather than continuing farming in the MCcoy tradition

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Grampa and his best friend George have their caps set on the new librarian

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL sends 86 and 99 into a circus to look for a smuggling operation

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The CONTROL agents are trapped on a KAOS island

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ enlists an unlikely ally in his effort to bring down Rutherford T Grant after the crooked captain frames a bank robbery on Samantha Stacks and Angie Final episode of the series

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans 310
programme.desc: Hogans 310

programme.title: Hogans 324
programme.desc: Hogans 324

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Pyle wants Sgt Carter to meet his cousin Bridey at the Camp Dance Carter declines until he and Cpl Boyle spot Pyle out with a very attractive girl They assume erroneously that the girl is Pyles cousin After that is explained there is another case of mistaken identity that keep Carter and Boyle busy

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan discovers an underground source of hot water on the island but The Professor soon learns that the source of the hot water is an active volcano on the other side of the island

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Vorjak and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons Augur is on the run from volunteers but sends a friend Juliet to help Liam while hes gone

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After investigating a planet where all humanoid life had been eradicated Koenig becomes trapped in a prison on one of the moons where no one knows that their planet has been wiped out

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old man whos feeling down because he had to sell his shop and has nothing to do sees a young man the grandson of his friend get into a fight with someone with the young man killing the other man with his gun The young man runs away leaving the gun behind The old man picks it up and when some people show up after hearing the shots they assume that the old man killed him Mike is called in and he knows the man and Mike doesnt believe he killed him but arrests him The young man was delivering something for a bookie and the one with the gun was trying to steal it He tries to explain to the bookie what happened but the bookie doesnt believe him because there is something more important than money in the box He then goes to see the old man and tells him that unless he gets the box back the bookie will do stuff to him Mike lets the old man out and follows him to find out whats going on

programme.title: Mission Imposssible
programme.desc: In a rare episode of the series in which the IM Force isnt sent on a government-sanctioned mission theyre forced by a criminal named Egan whos kidnapped the daughter of a friend of Briggs to capture a heavily guarded witness in a trial against him They know Egan plans to kill the witness but Briggs is put in a tight spot and is determined that Egan wont get a chance to kill the witness

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a deck hand on a charter boat a company believes the skipper left the country after embezzling cash and securities The police decide to use an agent as the boats replacement skipper since the next passenger is the embezzlers wife who intends to meet up with him in Mexico The police also decide to investigate the mysterious deckhand since he has no background

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Pardoned after a long imprisonment for a crime he didnt commit a man has Jarrods help in adjusting to being free again The man is hired to work at the ranch and after having doubt planted by one of the hands his fear of returning to prison may lead to the death of the man who was the Prosecuting Attorney in the his case- Jarrod

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by an Army hero before he dies to help his son enlist in the Army Cheyenne succeeds but the young man becomes disillusioned because of his horse and a head strong post commander who also is causing an Indian uprising

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.

programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Steven Arens v. Wade Baldwin.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Priceless golden relics are mysteriously disappearing in Singapore causing the population to think they are doomed MASK discovers that VENOM has somehow found a way to liquefy gold so they can smuggle it through pipelines

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Friend or Foe

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill re-programs Scooter making him into a suicide bomber aimed at UNECOMs headquarters
